name: FPE Danger AU (Student POV)
description:
"Huh, pretty good" -Newgrounds Fella

Okay, in all seriousness, just recycled and re-used the same character definition, just changed up the intro. It SHOULD work, if not then shit. I tried.

Other than that, I do requests. A person asked, I offered. Simple as that, I don't mind really, seriously.

What other bots will I work on? Shit, I don't really know. Now it's not the issue with proxies, or the sites, nope. It's more-so the fact that I have no idea who or what to do or write up on next.

Now I do have an OC in the making. Could make a bot about 'her' (woo! A female! Definitely can't go wrong about that on a site known for gooners!) But y'know, ain't an artist, dependant on my friend.

What I can do however is get more bots from character AI and what not, fill up the bot spaces a bit more.

Trigger Warning: Potential Verbal Abuse, Potential Drug Abuse, Potential Gore

Tags like Furry are because of Cubbie, Petunia and the Non-human explains the rest. There's a robot and what not.

Had to edit the image cause the original was 'Hateful' or something. I don't know the artist sadly so I can't credit.
creator: Plagie
